items.title: WHO proposing to cut jobs and slash budget by a fifth, memo shows | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The US withdrawal has exacerbated a funding crisis due to member states reducing their development spending. Faced with an income gap of nearly $600 million this year, the WHO has proposed to slash its budget for 2026-27 by 21%.

#who #worldhealthorganization #donaldtrump #jobcuts #News #Reuters #Newsfeed 

Read the story here: https://reut.rs/4jd5Z0p

items.title: Trump vs the Universities
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Trump administration says at least 60 schools have violated Title VI for allowing antisemitism to flourish on campus. Critics see this effort as a way for the White House to clamp down on freedom of speech, and to punish left-leaning institutions. On this weekend episode, our reporters Helen Coster and Julia Harte unpack the fight over higher education in America.










Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter here (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) . 


Listen to the Reuters Econ World podcast here (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flink.chtbl.com%2FAbxd8GDx&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7C61fba21571bc4521d54008dd62cc9fb1%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638775353175569335%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=OK3JQtm1p1ckSHrS0tg6WKa4wB4%2FW9KfiW1CgGSJj%2F0%3D&reserved=0) .

items.title: LIVE: Indiana's Republican Congresswoman Victoria Spartz holds town hall
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Ukrainian-born American politician and Republican U.S. Representative for Indiana’s 5th District Victoria Spartz hosts a town hall in the Indianapolis suburb of Westfield. Earlier this month, House Speaker Mike Johnson urged fellow Republican lawmakers to avoid public town-hall meetings with voters after some events turned into angry confrontations over President Donald Trump's moves to fire federal workers and defund government programs.
 
#Live #Indiana #VictoriaSpartz #Westfield #townhall #Indianapolis #politics #news #Reuters

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The US Commerce Department's personal consumption expenditures price index, a key measure of inflation, showed prices ticked up in February, fanning fears that Donald Trump's raft of tariffs on imports will boost prices in the coming months
